sourcePolicy: Official/public online sources only. No community sightings, rumors, secondary forums, or user-submitted reports.

precisionModel.store_level: specific store inventory when an official board exposes it
precisionModel.store_aggregate: official board product/inventory page reference, exact store may be unclear
precisionModel.board_county: official board shipment/release signal; exact store/shelf unknown
precisionModel.board_warehouse: statewide NC ABC warehouse radar; board/store unknown

currentPriceList.note: Official current quarterly price CSV used to enrich controlled-distribution, shipment, and warehouse rows by NC Code.

controlledDistributionList.note: Official public spreadsheet linked from NC ABCC Pricing Reports. It identifies product-control status only; it does not claim current stock, shipment, lottery, or store availability.

stockShipped.strictProductPolicy: Only explicit tracked names are accepted for shipment rows to avoid false positives from loose bottle-name matching.

warehouse.updateNote: Official page states warehouse stock status is refreshed frequently; treat as statewide radar, not store inventory.

Brewed by distilling malted grains such as rye, corn, wheat, or barley, whiskey is among the most diverse spirits on the list. Actually, the whiskey category includes a huge variety of spirits, from bourbon to scotch.
Rum is arguably one of the earliest known spirits due to its simple production process. Rum is made from sugarcane molasses or sugarcane juice. The sugarcane is fermented and then distilled.

durhamStructuredProducts.note: Parsed hidden Wix warmup dataset rows with productName / ncCode / price fields. No per-store quantity is exposed.

newHanoverPublicProducts.note: Parsed official WordPress barrel-pick product cards. Cards include NC Code / price / proof but no store-specific quantity.
